title: chrysopsis divaricata
intro: Chrysopsis divaricata, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant native to North America, specifically in the eastern and central regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including wound healing, antiseptic properties, and the potential to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Golden Ragwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
